===== aixa-install-chat-app.sh contents =====
#!/bin/bash
# Install Aixa's Teams app into a chat using Aixa's delegated Graph token.
set -euo pipefail
CHAT_ID="${1:?usage: $0 <chat-id>}"
APP_ID="${AIXA_TEAMS_CATALOG_ID:-PENDING_UPLOAD}"
TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/aixa-graph-token.sh)
EXIST=$(curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/chats/$CHAT_ID/installedApps?\$expand=teamsApp" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(any((x.get('teamsApp') or {}).get('id')=='$APP_ID' for x in d.get('value',[])))")
if [ "$EXIST" = "True" ]; then
  echo "already_installed"; exit 0
fi
curl -s -X POST "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/chats/$CHAT_ID/installedApps" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d "{\"teamsApp@odata.bind\":\"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$APP_ID\"}"
echo
